data_leakage_control: Papers were selected using a ChatGPT-4o familiarity check so that downstream analysis focuses on papers judged unfamiliar to the model.
notes: This release is intended for peer review analysis.
OpenReview forum and PDF links are provided per paper.
Reviewer identifiers are anonymized within each paper.
Only compressed JSONL files are distributed in yearly data/ICLR_* directories.
ICLR 2023, 2024, and 2025 records are stored separately to avoid cross-year ambiguity.
Anchor scoring is performed using a unified ChatGPT-4o-based protocol across all yearly subsets.
Candidate papers were selected with a ChatGPT-4o familiarity check to reduce potential data leakage risk.
paper_text_index.jsonl.gz files store paths and conversion quality metadata, not full text.
Key-like tokens in extracted paper text are redacted.
Paper text has been merged as individual UTF-8 txt files under texts/ICLR_2023, texts/ICLR_2024, texts/ICLR_2025_1, and texts/ICLR_2025_2.
